name: Spicy Stir-Fried Squid (Ojingeo Pokkum)
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the squid by inserting a finger into its body and cutting off the joint. Gently pull out the tentacles and remove the entrails without breaking the sac.
2. Cut open the tentacles, remove eyeballs and beak, and tear off triangular "hats". Use a kitchen cloth to rub the skin's end surface, then peel the skin from the body and "hat".
3. Halve the squid on the skin side, and score it in a diamond pattern. Cut into 1-inch wide pieces.
4. Cut green peppers into quarters lengthwise, bamboo shoot and onion into 1/8 inch slices, and green onions into 2-inch lengths.
5. Heat oil in a skillet and cook the squid, bamboo shoot, and onion over medium heat until heated through.
6. Add mushrooms and green peppers to the skillet and stir-fry for a few moments.
7. Stir in the chopped green onions.
8. Season with the combined seasoning ingredients. Sprinkle with roasted sesame seeds and stir-fry quickly.
9. Pour the remaining sesame oil around the sides of the skillet and transfer the dish to a serving plate.
